description: PHASE B — STRESS: $100,000 cash withdrawn for emergency regulatory compliance payment. Reserves drop to $415K. A simple backing check sees 207% backing (PASSES). But Converge.fi's liquidity gate catches that only $30K is immediate cash — 7.2% of reserves, below the 10% MiCA Art.45 threshold. The $385K locked in T-bills cannot be redeemed for weeks or months.

portfolioAdjustments.reason: $100K withdrawn — emergency regulatory compliance payment to state authority
